case_title: SHORENSTEIN REALTY SERVICES VS. SITOA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,959.79 FILED BY SHORENSTEIN REALTY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHORENSTEIN REALTY SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SITOA CORPORATION $3,140.60 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.60, THE JUDGMENT IS NET OF DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
